summary: Comprehensive testing of B2B fabric platform commission system. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend commission features verified via Playwright - Admin Commission page, Admin Orders commission section, and Agent Login OTP fix all working correctly.
passed_tests: Commission rules CRUD: POST /api/commission/rules - Creates all 5 rule types (vendor, category, cart_value, meterage, source)
Commission rules CRUD: GET /api/commission/rules - Lists all rules
Commission rules CRUD: PUT /api/commission/rules/{id} - Updates rules
Commission rules CRUD: DELETE /api/commission/rules/{id} - Deletes rules
Commission rules CRUD: DELETE returns 404 for nonexistent rule
9+ seeded commission rules exist in database
Rules cover all 5 types (vendor, category, cart_value, meterage, source)
Vendor orders API returns orders with commission fields
Admin orders API returns orders with commission fields
Agent send-otp endpoint returns valid JSON
Agent verify-otp endpoint returns valid JSON
Admin Commission page shows rules grouped by type (Vendor-specific, Category-wise, Cart Value Slab, Meterage Slab, Inventory vs RFQ)
Add Rule modal shows all 5 rule types with conditional fields
Admin Orders detail modal shows Commission & Seller Payout section with Commission Rate, Commission Amount, Rule Applied, and Seller Payout
Agent Login OTP flow works - uses res.text() then JSON.parse() instead of res.json()
critical_code_review_comments: Commission hierarchy correctly implemented: vendor > category > cart_value > meterage > source > default (5%)
Commission info (commission_pct, commission_amount, commission_rule, seller_payout) properly stored in order documents
VendorOrders.js has Commission and Your Payout columns in table header (lines 69-70) and data cells (lines 101-107)
VendorOrders.js modal has Commission & Payout section (lines 165-182)
AdminOrders.js modal has Commission & Seller Payout section (line 357)
AgentLoginPage.js correctly uses res.text() then JSON.parse() for OTP endpoints (lines 27-28, 48-49)
Seller email template includes commission section (email_router.py lines 393-404)
seed_data_creation: None - 9 commission rules already seeded via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission system fully tested. Key features: 1) Commission rules CRUD at /api/commission/rules with 5 rule types, 2) calculate_commission() function in commission_router.py applies priority hierarchy, 3) Commission info stored in orders (commission_pct, commission_amount, commission_rule, seller_payout), 4) Admin Commission page at /admin/commission shows rules grouped by type, 5) Admin Orders modal shows Commission & Seller Payout section, 6) Vendor Orders page has Commission and Your Payout columns (no orders for test vendor to verify visually), 7) Agent login OTP fix verified - uses res.text() instead of res.json().

commission_rules_crud.details: All CRUD operations work - create, read, update, delete for all 5 rule types

admin_commission_page.details: Page loads at /admin/commission, shows rules grouped by type, Add Rule modal has all 5 rule types

admin_orders_commission_section.details: Order detail modal shows Commission & Seller Payout section with Commission Rate, Amount, Rule Applied, Seller Payout

vendor_orders_commission_columns.details: Commission and Your Payout columns defined in code. Test vendor has no orders to verify visually.

agent_login_otp_fix.details: OTP send and verify endpoints return valid JSON. Frontend uses res.text() then JSON.parse() correctly.

commission_priority_hierarchy.details: Vendor-specific > Category > Cart Value Slab > Meterage Slab > Inventory/RFQ > Default (5%)
